title: Coat Hooks Wall-Mounted, 68cm White Wooden Board, Satin Nickel 6 Double Hooks, Classic Coat Rack - Fixings Included
features: HEAVY-DUTY HOOKS – The double-tiered metal hooks can hold up to 3.4kg each, making it suitable for storing items such as a winter coat and a bag on the same hook without overcrowding.
ECO-FRIENDLY – The board is made using wood sourced from well-managed forests, making it an enviromentally friendly choice.

MULTI-FUNCTIONAL – Our wall-mounted coat racks can be used in various settings, such as entryways, hallways, bedrooms, cloakrooms and offices to hang your coats, bags, hats, scarves, umbrellas, ropes and other items in order to free your floor space.
DIMENSIONS – Board 68.5cm (L) x 7cm (H) x 1.6cm (D); Overall inc hooks - 68.5cm (L) x 9.5cm (H) x 7.5cm (D); Spacings - Hooks 11.2cm; Mounting Holes 32cm
EASY TO INSTALL – This coat hanger comes pre-assembled with all the necessary fixings included, making installation quick and hassle-free.
description: From the manufacturer Everything can have a place The entryway gets a lot of traffic in every season, in and out from various activities and 'stuff' gets dropped at the door. Sometimes, stuff is laid down to untie shoes and accidentally forgotten right there in the middle of the floor and doorway. These 'accidents' come in all sorts of creative forms, but at the end of the day there are piles of discarded and forgotten and misplaced items all over the place! Why not add a hook rail or two to your busy spaces, creating usable organised storage zones. With a little creativity and a dash of instructional encouragement, 'Everything Can Have a Place'. The search is over Create a spot right at the door for all the things that don’t belong any farther into the house. There is no reason for the work jacket to be in the dining room or the dog leash in the bathroom. Assuming there aren’t curious teenagers in the house, car keys don’t need to be far from the garage. Get kids hooked on organisation Rather than clean up non-stop after your little angels, teach them the value of an organised life. To instill organisation into a child will help mould an adult who doesn’t lose keys, never fumbles for a matched pair of socks and always knows where her purse is. Although these lessons don’t end at the front door, they sure can begin there. Quick and simple conversion of wasted space Over-The-Door designs can be added to an interior door to create instant usable space on either or both sides. These convenient hook systems require zero instalation or permanent changes to the home. A great option for renters or any cramped spaces, such as bathrooms and behind the door of any bedroom. Hang one over the bar in a closet to create a movable set of hooks to hang shirts, pants, belts and hats that get regular use. Add a little style to organisation Headbourne hook rails offer dozens of budget-friendly and stylish options for any décor or back door.
